item.title: HyperX HX-HSCAM-GM Cloud MIX - Spellen met Bluetooth
item.description: You’ve got HyperX HX-HSCAM-GM Cloud MIX - Spellen met Bluetooth at the following link: ℹ️: Wired gaming headset certified for Hi-Res Audio sound with multi-device compatibility. Supported profiles: A2DP, AVRCP, HFP, HSP, DIP. Frequency response: 50 Hz-18,000 Hz Durability and comfort HyperX Dual chamber transducers HyperX generate better acoustic distinction and less distortion Integrated mic and removable micro rod Compatibility: Audio+Mic PC, Xbox One, PS4, Nintendo Switch, Mobile, Bluetooth Enabled Devices Wireless range: up to 10 meters Impedance: 40 Ω.
